commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Feishu monitor cleanup await bounded HTTP server shutdown before clearing tracked server and bot identity state, updates the stop wrapper, and adds focused cleanup/webhook tests.

PR surface: Source +124, Tests +270. Total +394 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main still closes Feishu HTTP servers and clears state before the close callback in both stop cleanup and webhook abort cleanup. I did not run a live Feishu restart loop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed because the replacement PR has no actionable review findings from this pass.

target.title: fix(feishu): await HTTP server shutdown during monitor cleanup
target.body:
Fixes #48183.

This repairs the existing contributor PR #48588 from @alex-xuweilong rather than opening a competing fix. The source PR already identified the right Feishu-local cleanup race; this pass should keep that attribution while making the branch landable.

Plan:
- rebase/update #48588 against current main 399f5bc993515d0a2d8f832e4386d5b8e504f9b9
- share a bounded closeHttpServer helper between monitor state and webhook cleanup
- wait for close or timeout before deleting httpServers and bot identity state
- keep server.close() before closeAllConnections() and clear fallback timers on successful close
- propagate cleanup rejections from monitorWebhook abort paths
- expose/retain an awaitable stop path where callers need shutdown ordering
- add focused behavior proof for delayed HTTP close and webhook abort cleanup

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/feishu/src/monitor.cleanup.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.webhook-e2e.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Before merge, run a fresh Codex /review and address every actionable finding.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156788-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48588
- Credit: Preserve @alex-xuweilong's authorship and credit from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48588 when repairing the branch.; Credit #48183 as the user-visible bug report fixed by the repaired PR.; Do not replace or close #48588; maintainer_can_modify=true, so Clownfish should repair the contributor branch directly.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run extensions/feishu/src/monitor.cleanup.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.webhook-e2e.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #48588 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against b2846f6d6906.
